summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 資料中心對高速連接技術的強勁需求，分析師普遍給予正面評級，儘管近期股價急漲後出現估值過高的擔憂。

bullish.title: Why Is Credo Technology Stock Soaring Monday? — Credo Technology (CRDO) stock hits new 52-week highs after Stifel and Evercore issue bullish price targets up to $350.
bullish.reason: Stifel 與 Evercore 等大型券商給予高達 350 美元的目標價，直接推動股價創下 52 週新高，顯示市場對其成長潛力的高度認可。

bullish.title: CRDO (NASDAQ:CRDO) Shines in CANSLIM Screen with Explosive Growth and Strong Leadership
bullish.reason: 符合 CAN SLIM 選股標準，具備 231% 的獲利成長與 157% 的營收成長，且維持零負債的強健財務結構。

bullish.title: Credo: The AI Memory Supercycle Needs More Bandwidth
bullish.reason: 指出 Micron 的 AI 記憶體超級週期將帶動對頻寬的需求，進而成為 Credo 銅纜與光纖網路技術的長期成長驅動力。

bullish.title: How Credo Technology Group’s (CRDO) 1.6T Connectivity Ramp Is Feeding Its AI Data-Center Growth
bullish.reason: 強調 1.6T 連接技術的量產進程，直接受惠於 AI 資料中心對高速傳輸的迫切需求。

bullish.title: The Brown Capital Management Small Company Fund Picked Credo Technology (CRDO) Amid Multiple Durable Growth Drivers
bullish.reason: 獲得知名機構 Brown Capital Management 的青睞，顯示長期投資人對其成長驅動因素的信心。

bearish.title: Credo Is Not Micron; Sell (Rating Downgrade) — Credo Technology (CRDO) downgraded to Sell after a 50% rally.
bearish.reason: 在股價經歷 50% 的漲幅後，分析師認為估值過高並將評級下調至賣出，提醒投資人需注意與記憶體大廠 Micron 的本質差異。

bearish.title: Credo Technology (CRDO) Slid Amid Replacement Risk Concerns
bearish.reason: 市場擔憂技術替代風險，導致股價出現短期回調壓力。

neutral.title: This Credo Technology Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Monday
neutral.reason: 此篇為多檔股票的綜合報導，雖對 CRDO 給予正面初始評級，但資訊較為分散，故歸類為中性參考。
